scene.message: So you all had{wait_fr:16}{nl} that dream too...{wait_fr:96}{ret}
{wait_fr:32}Truly{wait_fr:32} earth-shattering.{wait_fr:96}{ret}
Ms. Saeko: {ctl0f:1}!{nl} Are you alright?!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: ...{wait_fr:32}You mean Sonemura.{waitkey}{ret}
Agastya Tree: Young one...{nl} Go forth with care.{waitkey}{ret}
